items.title: Goodstoworld Unisex 3D Fake Abs T Shirts Shredded Chest Printed Short Sleeve Costume Novelty Tees Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: goodstoworld, unisex, fake, abs, shirts, shredded, chest, printed, costume, tees. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
